font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 设定: CTA Tile = 128×128, Warp Tile = 64×32, Thread Tile = 8×8, K-Tile = 8
CTA 内的 Warp 布局 (128×128 的 C tile, 每 Warp 64×32):
每个 Warp 内的 Thread Tile 布局 (64×32, 32个线程各 8×8):
Warp 中 32 个线程排成 4 行 × 8 列:

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 更精确: Warp Tile = 64×32, Thread Tile = 8×8
每行 thread: 32/8 = 4 个线程 (列方向)
每列 thread: 64/8 = 8 个线程 (行方向)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: C 累加器: 8×8 = 64 个 float = 64 个寄存器
A 片段: 8×1 = 8 个 float (每次从 SMEM 加载 A 的一列)
B 片段: 1×8 = 8 个 float (每次从 SMEM 加载 B 的一行)
总计: 64 + 8 + 8 = 80 个寄存器 / 线程 (最小值, 实际更多)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: // 1. 从 Global → Shared Memory (异步, 双缓冲)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 加载 A_tile[128×8] 和 B_tile[8×128] 到 SMEM

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: // 2. 从 Shared → Register (每次一个 k 步)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每线程加载 A_frag[8] = SMEM_A[my_rows, k] // 8 个 LDS

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每线程加载 B_frag[8] = SMEM_B[k, my_cols] // 8 个 LDS

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: SMEM 读: A_frag = 8×8 = 64 floats, B_frag = 8×8 = 64 floats → 128 floats × 4B = 512B

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: AI (Global 级) = 262144 / 8192 = 32 FLOP/Byte → 远超 Ridge Point!
